{{Quote|There's a Destroyer out there—let's give her a history lesson.|[[Tola (Galactic Civil War)|Captain Tola]], commanding the ''[[New Hope]]''|<ref name="Dark" />}}
The '''Second Battle of Milagro''' occurred in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].

==Prelude==
[[Milagro/Legends|Milagro]] had been the secret headquarters of the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] for several months.

Following the [[Milagro campaign|liberation]] of the planet, [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] went to Milagro in order to meet the victorious officers of the [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|New Republic Fourth Battle Group]]. Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Uther Kermen]] who had lost the planet decided to attack them.<ref name="TEGTW" />

The Mon Mothma's flagship, the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] ''[[New Hope]]'', was in orbit around the world. Six days before, a [[battle group/Legends|battle group]] had been dispatched to the [[Manali system/Legends|Menali system]], leaving the planet nearly undefended;<ref name="JK audio">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref> the only New Republic forces were the ''New Hope'' itself and its elite [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of new [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] starfighters and crack pilots.<ref name="Dark" />

Earlier, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] came visiting Mon Mothma with his girlfriend [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[agent/Legends|agents]] [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] had left [[Mission to Sulon|for a mission]], while [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] had left for his own mission, and then to meet Katarn and Ors on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]].<ref name="Dark" /><ref name="Dark Forces: Rebel Agent">''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]''</ref> 

[[Crynyd|Purdy M. Trico's Star Destroyer]] had sustained damage to its prow in an earlier battle and its captain, [[Purdy M. Trico]], had withdrawn to Milagro for repairs, believing it to be abandoned. It was followed by its convoy consisting of about thirty ships, half of them [[transport/Legends|transports]].<ref name="Dark" />

==The battle==
The ''New Hope'' came under attack by wings of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]], and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], without warning. Solo abandoned a planned dinner with Leia to take command of the ''New Hope''{{'s}} forces from his ship, the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. He would be joined by a squadron of X-wing crack pilots, and wounded pilots hastily recruited from the [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical frigate]] [[Mercy (hospital ship)|''Mercy'']]; they were ferried planetside to man two squadrons of mixed X-wings and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], and two newly-delivered [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]], forming the makeshift "[[Medpac Squadron]]". As they waited for their arrival, Captain Tola tried to command the defenses as well as the damage repairs. It was for the better that the Star Destroyer that delivered the TIEs did not approach the ''New Hope'', as its weapons would certain badly maul the old dreadnaught.<ref name="Dark" />

Based on the available movements and data, the ''New Hope'' supercomputer estimated the location of the Star Destroyer, and its vector was transmitted to Solo's group; then [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in his X-wing and [[Jan Ors]] and [[Kyle Katarn]] in the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]'' dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], returning from their mission to [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]], and happened to arrive in visual distance to the Star Destroyer. They immediately destroyed two TIE fighters and spotted their damaged mother ship, confirming its location. The Star Destroyer's [[task force/Legends|task force]] had formed protective screens around it, and Katarn suggested to fly between the destroyer and its surrounding support ships, thus reducing the Imperials' ability to use covering fire.<ref name="Dark" /><ref name="JK audio" />

===Counterattack===
[[File:Kyleincockpit.jpg|thumb|left|Kyle Katarn and Jan Ors guide the ''Crow'' next to the ''Falcon'' during the battle.]]
With the Destroyer's location known, Solo's group, with [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends#After_Endor|Red]],<ref name="JK audio" /> [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends#New Republic Service|Blue]] and Medpac Squadrons, moved towards them to counterattack. The Rebel fighters pressed on directly against the Star Destroyer, absorbing some of the attack. The Imperial [[task force/Legends|task force]] leader launched [[Flight/Legends|two-ship flights]] to lure some fighters away.<ref name="Dark" />

Trico also executed his [[executive officer/Legends|XO]] for failing to warn in time that the Dreadnaught was maneuvering closer moving against them to contribute its heavy weapons to the fight. He also ordered to break the protective formation in order to be able to destroy the two ships that flew around them. The crew complied, although they knew it was a mistake: it was right when the ''Falcon'' and its group arrived to engage directly.<ref name="Dark" /><ref name="JK audio" />

Nine [[standard hour/Legends|hours]] after the initial attacks, Trico refused to retreat. Only few TIEs remained to protect his ship, while it became vulnerable. After three hours of battle, the situation was decided; the Imperial [[weapons-control officer]] killed Trico, and the battle ended two minutes later with her unconditional surrender.<ref name="Dark" />

==Aftermath==
Among the ships captured was the transport ''[[High Hauler]]'', which was used soon after [[Mission to Ruusan|to bring]] the ''Moldy Crow'', [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] to [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] undetected.<ref name="Dark" />

For his part in the battle, Skywalker was promoted to [[General/Legends|general]], while the captured Star Destroyer was renamed the ''[[Crynyd]]'' and would later be a part of Solo's fleet in the campaign against [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].

==Behind the scenes==
The battle is described in ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' novella and the [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight|audio adaptation]]. In those sources the participants and organization of the squadrons are not defined clearly. 

The novella mentions one formal squadron belonging to the ''New Hope'', but it is not named. Two improvised squadrons are mentioned, totalling three; one being the "Medpac", and the other not named. Except the Medpac, the novella mentions a "Blue Six"<ref name="Dark" /> suggesting the presence of a [[Blue Squadron (disambiguation)|Blue Squadron]], but without specifying if it is the formal squadron from ''New Hope'' or one of the two improvised ones conventionally named Blue. In the audio adaptation a "Red One" appears,<ref name="JK audio" /> suggesting the presence of a [[Red Squadron (disambiguation)|Red Squadron]].
